mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in real personal consumption expenditures (proxied by RSAFS) indicates robust aggregate demand, which supports corporate earnings growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:Retail sales rising steadily through early 2017
failure_condition: Rank IC of RSAFS month-over-month growth vs. 20-day forward return is below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or the long-short portfolio based on RSAFS growth terciles fails to generate positive Sharpe ratio over the same period.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the federal funds rate above 1.0% signals the Fed's commitment to tightening, which raises discount rates and depresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
evidence_refs: fact:Fed raised rates in Dec 2015 and Dec 2016; further hikes expected
failure_condition: In triggered instances (FEDFUNDS > 1.0%), the average 5-day forward return is not negative or the proportion of negative returns is not significantly above 50% (binomial test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment is low and retail sales are expanding simultaneously, the economy is in a 'full-employment plus consumption boom' regime that amplifies corporate profit growth, driving positive long-horizon equity returns.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 4.8% and RSAFS rising in Jan 2017
failure_condition: The interaction term (UNRATE decline * RSAFS increase) does not yield a statistically significant positive coefficient in a linear regression on 60-day forward returns (p > 0.05), or Sharpe ratio of the combined signal long-short portfolio is below 0.5 over full sample.

mechanism_narrative: During an industrial recession (INDPRO declining year-over-year for at least 3 months), a subsequent stabilization or upturn in industrial production signals the end of the recession and precedes a recovery in equity markets.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO was 104.55 in Jan 2017, up from 103.8 a year earlier
failure_condition: Following occurrences of the identified regime, the average 20-day forward return is not significantly positive (one-sided t-test p > 0.10), or the strategy fails to beat a buy-and-hold benchmark over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in the unemployment rate below 4.5% indicates an overheating labor market that may lead to wage inflation, compress profit margins, and trigger a negative equity market reaction over the subsequent month.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE stood at 4.8% in Jan 2017; nearing full employment
failure_condition: In triggered instances (UNRATE < 4.5%), the average 20-day forward return is positive, or the proportion of negative returns is not significantly above 50% (binomial test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is low (below 1%) and housing starts are above 1,200 thousand units, the combination signals accommodative monetary policy and a robust housing market, jointly supporting economic growth and positive long-term equity returns.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 0.65% and HOUST at 1226 in Dec 2016
regime_hint: accommodative monetary policy with housing strength
failure_condition: The joint signal (both conditions met) does not produce an average 60-day forward return significantly greater than zero (t-test p > 0.10), or the hit rate (positive returns) is below 60% over the full history.

mechanism_narrative: In the early phase of a post-recession recovery, a rapid acceleration in retail sales (month-over-month growth above 0.5%) signals pent-up consumption being released, which boosts corporate earnings and drives positive short-term equity returns.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS was 472142 in Jan 2017, up 0.6% from Dec 2016
failure_condition: In triggered instances (RSAFS growth > 0.5%), the 5-day forward return is not positive on average, or the strategy's cumulative return over any 1-year period is negative.

mechanism_narrative: A consistent upward trend in industrial production month-over-month reflects expanding manufacturing activity and overall economic health, which translates into positive micro returns for equities over the very short term.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO rose from 103.8 to 104.55 over the past year
failure_condition: Rank IC of INDPRO month-over-month changes vs. 5-day forward return is below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or the long-only signal fails to produce a Sharpe ratio above 0.3.
